name: Magento
description: Connect to your Magento 2 store to sync orders, products, customers, and categories.

install_fields.label: Store URL
install_fields.description: Your Magento 2 store base URL (e.g. https://mystore.com).

install_fields.label: Integration Access Token
install_fields.description: Magento Integration access token. From Admin → System → Integrations → Create Integration.
